headline_findings: FedGeo v5b is the strongest geometry-aware variant tested.
On SST-2, FedGeo v5b outperformed FedAvg on multi-seed average while also showing lower variance.
On MRPC, calibrated geometry remained competitive but did not clearly outperform FedAvg.
On QQP, FedGeo v5b matched FedAvg on the current run.
Across experiments, naive or aggressive geometry weighting was unstable; clipping, shrinkage, and hybrid mixing were necessary.
